summary: The top-level `appointments` verb is owned by the hand-built cross-clinic view command (upcoming/past, live per-clinic); the generated store-backed appointments endpoint command must NOT also be registered, and appointments is not an auto-refresh/store-backed path.
reason: Patient appointments are session-gated and fetched live per clinic, so the unified view command (upcoming/past + --all-clinics) supersedes the generated `appointments` endpoint wrapper. Registering both produced a duplicate cobra command (two `appointments` in --help, undefined resolution). A regen must drop the generated appointments endpoint command, keep it out of readCommandResources, and not advertise appointments get/list/search in the freshness contract.
validated_outcome: janeapp-pp-cli --help lists `appointments` exactly once (the view command with upcoming/past). go build/vet/test and verify-skill pass.
